name: Broccoli Stuffed Shells
recipeIngredient: 18 jumbo pasta shells, cooked al dente
fresh ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place broth in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add mushrooms, onions, and garlic. Cook, stirring, for 5 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from heat and stir in oregano, basil, ricotta, broccoli, and egg whites.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
4. Stuff drained shells with the ricotta-broccoli mixture.
5. Spread half a cup of tomato sauce on the bottom of a 9 by 13 inch nonstick baking pan. Arrange shells over the sauce. Top with remaining sauce.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until shells are hot. Season with black pepper to taste.
